concept: Health / Wholeness of Body / Vital Condition
description: The state of being free from illness; the wholeness of body and mind functioning well. 'Sunai' names the condition of vitality—systems in harmony, life flowing freely.
sound_symbolism: The word sustains with vitality. 'Su' flows with sustaining force, life maintained. 'Na' nurtures with inner care, body tended. Then 'i' rises to vital brightness.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo sunai' (the health). The condition underlying 'towe' (well). Supported by 'nepha' (medicine).

pillars.solarpunk-values: Health as commons—wellbeing supported by community and environment.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Health as interdependent—body wellness connected to mind, community, and world.
